title: Long-read DNA preparation for bacterial isolates
author: He Sun
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.64ghgtw

steps.title: Add cation-adjusted Müller-Hinton broth in a 15 ml Falcon tube
steps.instruction: Add cation-adjusted Müller-Hinton broth in a 15 ml Falcon tube. (Müller-Hinton medium is used here for antibiotic-resistant bacteria) 5 mL, CAMHB

steps.title: Add 1/4 10 µl-loop of colony...
steps.instruction: Add 1/4 10 µl-loop of colony from an agar plate in the solution.

steps.title: Vortex the mixture for 5 s at maximum speed
steps.instruction: Vortex the mixture for 5 s at maximum speed.

steps.title: Incubate the mixture overnight on a...
steps.instruction: Incubate the mixture overnight on a shaking bench at the speed of 120 rpm at 37 ℃. 37 °C

steps.title: Add 2 ml of the incubated mixture in a 2
steps.instruction: Add 2 ml of the incubated mixture in a 2.5 ml Eppendorf tube.

steps.title: Centrifuge the mixture
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the mixture. 20 °C 00:10:00

steps.title: Resuspend the bacterial pellet in Buffer G3 by vortexing
steps.instruction: Resuspend the bacterial pellet in Buffer G3 by vortexing. 1 mL, Buffer G3

steps.title: Add lysozyme and Proteinase K 20...
steps.instruction: Add lysozyme and Proteinase K 20 µL, lysozyme (100 mg/ml) 25 µL, Proteinase K

steps.title: Gently resuspend the mixture and incubate...
steps.instruction: Gently resuspend the mixture and incubate at 37 ℃ for 20 min without shaking. 37 °C 00:20:00

steps.title: Add Buffer G4 400 µL, Buffer G4
steps.instruction: Add Buffer G4 400 µL, Buffer G4

steps.title: Gently resuspend the mixture and incubate...
steps.instruction: Gently resuspend the mixture and incubate at 50 ℃ for 30 min without shaking. 50 °C 00:30:00

steps.title: Centrifuge the mixture
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the mixture. 20 °C 00:05:00

steps.title: Equilibrate the column (AXG 20) with Buffer N2
steps.instruction: Equilibrate the column (AXG 20) with Buffer N2. 1 mL, Buffer N2

steps.title: Add Buffer N2 (room temperature) to the sample
steps.instruction: Add Buffer N2 (room temperature) to the sample. Vortex the mixture for 15 s at maximum speed. 1 mL, Buffer N2

steps.title: Load 1 ml of the mixture on the column
steps.instruction: Load 1 ml of the mixture on the column. Allow it to enter the resin by gravity flow.

steps.title: Discard the supernatant
steps.instruction: Discard the supernatant. (For anaerobes, due to low concentration of bacterial culture, it is suggested to repeat step 5 to step 7 several times in order to obtain enough amount of DNA)

steps.title: Reload 1 ml of the mixture on the column
steps.instruction: Reload 1 ml of the mixture on the column. Do not reload if the mixture of former step has not been filtered completely in case the column gets clogged.

steps.title: Reload the rest mixture
steps.instruction: Reload the rest mixture.

steps.title: Transfer the supernatant to a 5 ml Eppendorf tube
steps.instruction: Transfer the supernatant to a 5 ml Eppendorf tube.

steps.title: Wash the column with Buffer N3
steps.instruction: Wash the column with Buffer N3. 1 mL, Buffer N3 three times

steps.title: Elute the genomic DNA with Buffer N5
steps.instruction: Elute the genomic DNA with Buffer N5. Collect the DNA solution in a 2.5 ml Eppendorf tube. 1 mL, Buffer N5 The average concentration of DNA is approximately 10 µg/ml. Store at 4 ℃ if you want to stop here 4 °C, Do not freeze

steps.title: Add magnetic Beads ( 0
steps.instruction: Add magnetic Beads ( 0.35 volume, AMPure) to the DNA sample. Gently resuspend by hand. 350 µL, Magnetic beads 1000 µL, DNA sample

steps.title: Incubate the mixture
steps.instruction: Incubate the mixture. 00:10:00 20 °C, Room temperature

steps.title: Spin down and let the beads...
steps.instruction: Spin down and let the beads bind to magnetic plate until the liquid is clear.

steps.title: Stay on the magnet and remove supernatant
steps.instruction: Stay on the magnet and remove supernatant.

steps.title: Wash with Ethanol
steps.instruction: Wash with Ethanol. Do not disturb pellet. 150 µL, Ethanol (80%)

steps.title: Remove supernatant
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant.

steps.title: go to step #26
steps.instruction: go to step #26

steps.title: Spin down and let the beads...
steps.instruction: Spin down and let the beads bind to magnetic plate again. Remove the residual liquid with a 10 µl pipette.

steps.title: Add nuclease free water and resuspend gently
steps.instruction: Add nuclease free water and resuspend gently. 55 µL, Nuclease free water

steps.title: Incubate the DNA solution
steps.instruction: Incubate the DNA solution. 00:15:00 37 °C

steps.title: Spin down and put on the magnetic plate
steps.instruction: Spin down and put on the magnetic plate. Retrieve the supernatant (DNA) with a 10 µl pipette. Determine dsDNA concentration e.g. by Qubit. Determine DNA length by Agarose gel or Bioanalyzer.
